explanations.2: This imports a custom plugin from a .cjs file (CommonJS format) even though we're in an ES module context; Docusaurus handles this conversion automatically.
explanations.12: The 'beforeDefaultRemarkPlugins' array means these plugins run before Docusaurus's built-in markdown processors, so they can transform content first.
explanations.15: This plugin is being added to the beforeDefaultRemarkPlugins array to process markdown files before the default plugins do their work.
